message:
fix(sqlite): tighten SAVEPOINT authorizer to only allow batch wrapper br-knqyl

The prior fix (b61bdfcf) allowed all user-supplied SAVEPOINT/RELEASE/ROLLBACK
TO statements under the Write policy, which silently loosened transaction
control. SAVEPOINT is a form of nested-transaction control, so callers could
open implicit transactions. Match specifically on the internal
`fcp_sqlite_batch` name so only the batch wrapper's own savepoint is allowed;
every other savepoint stays denied. Added execute_rejects_user_supplied_savepoint
regression test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
